Each section has the same medication categories with long text fields for detailed responses. The top section has general questions about frequency, duration, and dosage that apply to the medication history questions below.

pages.notes: This page contains multiple interconnected sections about pain, stress, pre-existing conditions, and treatment history. Some fields have conditional logic (like migraine details appearing only if diagnosed with migraines). The page includes various measurement scales (VAS, percentages) and requires careful attention to the distinction between current bruxism symptoms and pre-existing conditions.

pages.notes: This page appears to be a diagnostic photography checklist with various oral and facial conditions to be documented. Most sections contain lists of conditions that can be circled/selected. Some sections like 'Lateral Border of the Tongue Scalloping', 'Bleeding on Flossing', 'Tongue Blades adhering to inside of cheeks', and several others appear to be just labels without selectable options - these are treated as section headers only.
